config.tooltip.enable_ai:
App Message and StardewSocial use AI to generate content. By enabling this option, you acknowledge that you understand 
the potential privacy and security implications of using AI features, for example of harmful content, personal data leaks, and so on.
Never include sensitive information, such as real name, contact details, credentials, etc in the conversation with the AI.
config.tooltip.open_phone_key: The key used to open your in-game smartphone.
config.tooltip.language: Enter your prefered language. However English is the best supported.
config.tooltip.who_can_message:
Meet: NPC must be talked to at least once.
Friend: NPC must have at least 1 heart.
config.tooltip.disable_daily_message:
If enabled, the `Good morning...` option will be disabled.
You should keep this option False which overtime will help the AI understand what is lore of the character.
config.tooltip.disable_update_warning:
Disable warning letter when new version are available.
By disabling this warning, you should already know and understand how to update the mod safely without losing your own data.
You will still be notified when newer version available on the phone lock screen.
config.tooltip.ai_settings: API key, model choice, and limits setting.
config.tooltip.storage_limits: How many messages, posts, and photos are kept on your computer.
config.tooltip.notifications: Toggle popup notifications for each app.
config.paragraph.ai_settings: These settings are only effective when an API key is provided. You can use your own OpenAI or Gemini key. Advanced custom endpoint settings are available in config.json only. When custom api is using, these setting are no longer used.
config.tooltip.key:
Use your own OpenAI or Gemini key to remove shared usage limits.
OpenAI key: https://platform.openai.com/account/api-keys
Gemini key: https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey
Restart the game after changing this value.
config.tooltip.model:
Chooses the model.
Of course if you using OpenAI key, you should choose OpenAI model and vice versa for Gemini key.
config.tooltip.social_activity: Controls how often StardewSocial posts and engagement are generated.
config.tooltip.npc_characteristic:
NPC characteristic give the AI a background for each NPC during the chat and the post generation.
Higher detail improves quality but uses more tokens per NPC.
config.tooltip.high_quality_comment:
If enabled, AI will be provided with the minimal characteristic detail for each NPC.
This may improve the quality of comments but will use more tokens.
config.tooltip.summary_max_words:
Conversation are summarized daily so the AI knows what the previous conversation is about.
Higher limit means AI will `remember` more details but will use more tokens.
Memory saved at "Userdata\\SaveFolder\\summary".
config.tooltip.posts_to_keep: Older posts are removed first when this limit is exceeded.
config.tooltip.player_photos_to_keep: Older player photos are deleted first.
config.tooltip.npc_photos_to_keep: Older NPC photos are deleted first.
config.tooltip.messages_per_npc: Older text messages are removed first when this limit is exceeded.
config.tooltip.show_ai_credit:
You have a limited number of usage of the AI features each day when no key is provided.
This option shows how many usages you have left. Check it at Messages -> NPC -> AI Credit.
config.tooltip.show_social_image_tags: Shows saved image tag text above attached images in StardewSocial posts.
config.tooltip.show_unread_comment: Shows unread comment count on posts.
config.tooltip.show_message_image_tags: Shows attached image tags when hovering photo bubbles in the Text app.
config.tooltip.camera_flash_radius: Radius of the temporary world light when camera FLASH mode is enabled.
config.tooltip.small_phone_size:
Not the ideal size, however in case you have a small screen.
You can also adjust the game UI scale which will also affect the phone size.
config.tooltip.show_phone_icon: Show the phone icon on the screen. You can adjust its position with the options below.
config.tooltip.phone_icon_x:
Horizontal offset in pixels for the phone icon.
Negative = move left, positive = move right.
config.tooltip.phone_icon_y:
Vertical offset in pixels for the phone icon.
Negative = move up, positive = move down.
config.tooltip.notification_popups: Show HUD popups for Notification app updates.
config.tooltip.message_popups: Show HUD popups for new NPC text messages.
config.tooltip.social_popups: Show HUD popups for new StardewSocial activity.
config.tooltip.new_message_chance: Chance to receive a new message from NPCs.
config.tooltip.ignored_npcs:
These NPC do not have mobile phone, hence they cannot be texted or post on StardewSocial.
Must use NPC internal name not displayed name, separated by ','
mail.update_warning: === Smartphone ===^^Newer version of Smartphone are available. Your current version may be outdated and no longer working.^^Please note that your data, including conversation, summary, setting, memory, everything,... are saved in        $$/Mods/Smartphone/Userdata$$ folder.^    >> YOU MUST COPY IT WHEN UPDATE THE MOD @@

notification.check_phone: === Smartphone ===^^Many things are happening, remember to check your Smartphone.

ui.message.description_placeholder: Significant things about your farmer that you'd like other NPCs to know. Don't give boring invaluable details such as 'I like farming' - add something that stands out!!! Get a key to bypass the limit.
